design_philosophy: A premium, developer-focused marketing site blending Swiss Brutalist typography with high-tech terminal aesthetics. The design uses stark contrasts, visible structural grids, and technical precision to establish authority in the AI freelancing space for developers.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-accent-default

anti_patterns: Avoid centered text blocks for body paragraphs; use left-aligned for technical precision
Never use default bold for every header; use black/heavy weights for H1 and regular/medium for H3/H4

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Visible Grids (The Control Room & Tech Grid).

surface_strategies.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 border-b border-white/10. Sticky top-0 z-50.
surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders & Neumorphic Tech: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A]. Hover states include a subtle -translate-y-1 and a glow effect shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)].
surface_strategies.feature_sections: Visible grid lines (border-collapse style) exposing the skeleton of the UI.
surface_strategies.buttons: Brutalist Sharp: rounded-none or max rounded-sm. Solid white for primary, 1px border for secondary with transparent background.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons (duotone or regular weight) for a technical, precise look. Fallback to lucide-react if needed.

interactive.buttons: Use clear hover transitions: `transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white hover:text-black` for outline, `hover:bg-gray-200` for primary.
interactive.inputs: Shadcn standard but customized: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-[#27272A] focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white rounded-sm.
interactive.badges: Font-mono text-xs border border-[#27272A] bg-[#121212] text-foreground/70 px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-wider.

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
animations.reveals: Framer Motion: Fade up and slight scale-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) staggered across grids.
animations.micro_interactions: The 'Tracing Beam' effect for the Tools Directory cards (glowing border on hover).

media_and_images.guidelines: Images must be dark-themed, architectural, or technical. Overlays MUST be used if placing text over images (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A] to-transparent). Max height on mobile: 80vh.

hero_background.description: Abstract code/data screen, use as low-opacity background behind the main hero text with a heavy gradient fade to #0A0A0A.

about_section.description: Developer setup with open MacBook in dark environment. Use for the 'About' or 'Who is this for' section.

ai_freelancing_guide.description: Minimalist dark workspace lamp. Good conceptual image for 'Guidance' or 'Learning'.

blog_placeholder.description: Coder's workspace filled with code and keyboards. Use as the featured image for the main blog post card.

tools_directory_bg.description: Multicolored code snippet. Use softly behind the tools directory header.

newsletter_bg.description: Modern dark workspace with laptop and microphone. Perfect for the newsletter/community opt-in section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. DO NOT introduce arbitrary gradients or colors like 'SaaS Blue' or 'Teal'.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures to allow for asymmetry, and Shadcn ONLY for interactive elements (forms, select, inputs).
Never use `Inter` for headings. Install and use `Cabinet Grotesk` (via Google Fonts or local font-face) for Headings, and `JetBrains Mono` for code snippets and overlines.
Buttons should have sharp or slightly rounded edges (rounded-sm maximum), giving a Brutalist/Technical feel.
Implement the 'Grid Borders' pattern for the Tools Directory—showing a 1px border (#27272A) on the right and bottom of the grid items to create a seamless grid look.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively. Never use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
Implement `data-testid` on all buttons, links, and forms for testing.
Ensure all text against images has proper accessibility via a dark overlay gradient (`bg-black/60` minimum opacity).
